steps.title: Observed Request Collection
steps.prompt: Use a real operator-style request from the current project context and execute the smallest safe pipeline step that can produce a benchmarkable observed_request run. Keep the output concise and preserve enough structure to classify next action and routing behavior.

steps.title: Observed Output Collection
steps.prompt: Capture an observed_output-quality response sample from a real workflow branch. Preserve response structure and next action markers so the result can be reused for response-mode benchmark comparison.
